OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchContractRecords

omniProcessElements.name: RA_ContractRecords
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "existingDraftContract" : "=IF(%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec:Status% == \"Draft\",%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec:Id%,'' )", "hpfList" : "%LA_TransformHPFRecords%", "hpfRecordExist" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%LA_TransformHPFRecords%),false,true)", "executedContract" : "=IF(%SV_SetHPFReturnFields:isEmployeeOrIC% == true AND %DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec:Status% == \"Draft\",'',IF(%SV_SetHPFReturnFields:isEmployeeOrIC% == true AND ISBLANK(%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec%),%IP_FetchActiveContracts:activeContract:Id%,IF(%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec:Status% == \"Executed\",%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec:Id%, %IP_FetchActiveContracts:activeContract:Id%)))", "swapEEAndICDates" : "=IF(%SV_SetHPFReturnFields:isEmployeeOrIC% == true AND %employeeType% != %IP_FetchActiveContracts:activeContract:Employment_Type__c%,true,false)", "executedContractDetails" : "=IF(%SV_SetHPFReturnFields:isEmployeeOrIC% == true AND ISBLANK(%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec%),%IP_FetchActiveContracts:activeContract%,IF(%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec:Status% == \"Executed\",%DE_FetchContractRecords:contractRec%,%IP_FetchActiveContracts:activeContract% ))" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: IP_FetchActiveContracts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "personAccountId" : "=%contactId%", "employeeType" : "=%employeeType%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_FetchActiveContracts", "remoteOptions" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "disableChainable" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DE_FetchContractRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "accountId" : "=%contactId%", "employeeType" : "%employeeType%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DEFetchContractRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DE_FetchExecutedContractsFromServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "hpfRecords", "sendJSONPath" : "DE_FetchHPFRecords:hpfRecords", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRFetchExecutedContractsFromServiceAccounts", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DE_FetchHPFRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "practitionerId" : "%contactId%", "status" : [ "Prospect", "Candidate", "Waiting to be Scheduled", "Active", "WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site" ], "employeeType" : "%employeeType%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DEFetchHPFRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_MergeExecutedContractTierRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ "AccountId" ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DE_FetchHPFRecords:hpfRecords", "hpfRecords" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_TransformHPFRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "matchingPath" : "Id", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "matchingPath" : "hpfId", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "LA_MergeExecutedContractTierRecords" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "SV_SetHPFReturnFields:hpfFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "hpfStatus" : "= Status__c", "contractingStatus" : "= Contracting_Status__c", "facilityTitle" : "= Facility_Title__r:Name", "accountName" : "= Account:Name", "effectiveDate" : "= EffectiveFrom", "Id" : "=Id", "facilityId" : "=Facility_Title__c", "accountId" : "=Account:Id", "nppaTier" : "=NPPATier" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_SetHPFReturnFields
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "hpfFields" : "= \"hpfStatus,contractingStatus,facilityTitle,accountName,accountId,effectiveDate,Id,facilityId,Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c,NPPATier\"", "isEmployeeOrIC" : "=IF(%employeeType% == 'Employee' OR %employeeType% == 'Independent Contractor',true,false)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
